title: Repair Disc 11
description: This mod allows you to repair the broken disc and listen to the actual song behind it.
body:
# Repair Disc 11
Most of you probably know the recent addition of the disc 5 that technically fits with 13 and 11 in some ways, but most of you don't know that there was an actual real and not broken version of the song 11. This one wasn't included in the actual game but its on the Minecraft Volume Beta album by C418.

This mod adds just that, the actual repaired disc 11 (when repaired changes the name to "eleven") with the song that should be played.

### Modpacks?
Of course

### Reupload to some weird websites?
Obviosuly no

## Preview Video
<iframe width="1280" height="720" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/T283tYDVc_M" title="What happens if you repair Minecraft's broken disc (Disc 11)" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
